headline: A Look At Lamb Weston (LW) Valuation As Activist Starboard Pressures Board On Costs And Strategy Reset
summary: Activist pressure puts Lamb Weston in focus Starboard Value LP’s recent public letter to Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) is putting fresh attention on the stock, as the activist investor presses the board to reset strategy and tighten cost management. Starboard is challenging the company’s existing $250 million cost savings program, arguing that selling, general, and administrative expenses have nearly tripled over the past decade despite what it describes as modest volume growth. The investor is...
